# NTUTEC 台大創創中心
> National Taiwan University Innovation and Entrepreneurship Center

## About
NTUTEC (NTU Taidah Entrepreneurship Center / 台大創創中心) is National Taiwan University's official innovation and entrepreneurship center. Founded in 2013, NTUTEC has supported over 600 startup teams across 13 years, bridging university research, industry partners, and investment capital to commercialize deep-tech from lab to market.

## Key Services
- Accelerator Program: 10-month program, 20 teams per cohort, mentorship + resources
- Angels Club (NTUTEC ANGELS 台大天使會): Angel investor network for NTU-affiliated startups, 40+ members, monthly deal reviews
- Corporate Innovation: Consulting and co-acceleration for enterprises seeking startup collaboration
- Mentor Network: 80+ lifetime mentors, 40+ active 2026 mentors across tech, business, and investment
- NTU Garage (台大車庫): Virtual incubation space for NTU-affiliated early-stage teams

## Contact
- Website: https://tec.ntu.edu.tw
- Email: ntutec@ntutec.com
- Address: 台北市中正區思源街 18 號 台大水源校區卓越研究大樓 7 樓 (NTU Siyuan Campus)

## Key Pages
- /about — About NTUTEC and the HI3 model
- /accelerator — Accelerator program details and application
- /mentors — Mentor directory (40+ active mentors)
- /angel — Angels Club (NTUTEC ANGELS 台大天使會)
- /pitch — Submit a startup pitch
- /apply — Apply to the accelerator program
- /consulting — Corporate innovation consulting
- /faq — Frequently asked questions
- /contact — Contact us
- /programs — All programs overview
- /startups — Portfolio startup directory
- /demo-day — Annual Demo Day event
- /team — NTUTEC team members
